zh.lifeSummary: 當John Somerville於1345年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾時，他的父親Walter de Somerville16歲，母親Janet Preston20歲。他於1372年與Margaret Edmonston在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾藍納可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾坎布茲森享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Somerville于1345年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾时，他的父亲Walter de Somerville16岁，母亲Janet Preston20岁。他于1372年与Margaret Edmonston在英国苏格兰藍納可爾藍納可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年在苏格兰藍納可爾坎布茲森享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Somerville was born in 1345, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Somerville, was 16 and his mother, Janet Preston, was 20. He married Margaret Edmonston in 1372, in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1400, in Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Somerville est né en 1345, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Somerville, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Janet Preston, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Edmonston en 1372, à Lanark, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1400, à Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Somerville 1345 in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Somerville 16 und seine Mutter Janet Preston 20. Er hat 1372 in Lanark, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Edmonston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Somerville è nato il nel 1345 nel Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter de Somerville, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Janet Preston, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Edmonston nel 1372, nel Lanark, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1400, nel Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Somervilleが1345年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Walter de Somervilleは16歳，母Janet Prestonは20歳であった。1372年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアラナルクでMargaret Edmonstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカンブスネサンで55歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Somerville(이)가 1345년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Somerville(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Preston(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1372년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 랜아르크에서 Margaret Edmonston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 캄버스네스아에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Somerville nasceu em 1345, em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter de Somerville, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Janet Preston, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Edmonston em 1372, em Lanark, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1400, em Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Somerville родился в 1345 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter de Somerville было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Preston, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Edmonston в 1372 г. в местности ланарк, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1400 г. в местности камбуснетань, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Somerville nació en 1345, en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter de Somerville, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Janet Preston, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Margaret Edmonston en 1372, en Lanark, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1400, en Cambusnethan, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Lanarkshire, Scotland.
